instruction: Identify the affected software versions in this vulnerability.
input: Under some circumstances an Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS 10 versions prior to 10.1.6 and 11 versions prior to 11.0.3 allows API calls to expose credentials in plain text.
output: The affected software versions include Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS versions 10 prior to 10.1.6 and versions 11 prior to 11.0.3.
